mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO test_user (username, email, phone, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.username}, #{item.email}, #{item.phone}, #{item.status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM test_user WHERE username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%') AND status = 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE test_user SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}

UPDATE test_user SET status = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
